AgentDeclaration.description:
One declared agent's group membership.

Carries no permissions itself; sink rules already grant those. A group
is a label on the acting principal that a rule's `when:` can test via
`agent.groups.any(...)`.
AgentDeclaration.title: AgentDeclaration

Defaults.description: Default-deny posture for sources and sinks not otherwise declared.
Defaults.title: Defaults

Mode.description:
The enforcement mode: governs behavior on evaluation error.

A correct `block`/`require_approval` decision always holds, except under
`DRY_RUN`, which downgrades every decision to allow.
Mode.title: Mode

SinkRule.description:
One ordered rule within a sink's rule list. First match wins.

`require_endorsement` is sugar for the common "gate untrusted data
lacking this endorsement kind" shape: setting it compiles to the
equivalent `when:` CEL text, so most rules needing this never
hand-write CEL. Mutually exclusive with `when`; a rule may set at most
one of the two.
SinkRule.title: SinkRule

SourceDeclaration.description: A declared ingress source and the trust level it resolves to.
SourceDeclaration.title: SourceDeclaration

TrustLevel.description: The result of resolving a source name against a policy's sources table.
TrustLevel.title: TrustLevel

description: The validated shape of a policy YAML file.
title: PolicyDocument
